chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الْإِشَارَةِ وَ النَّصِّ عَلَى أَبِي الْحَسَنِ الرِّضَا ( عليه السلام )
chapter_title.en: Chapter 72 – The Indication and the wordings upon Abu Al-Hassan Al-Reza<sup>asws</sup>

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: كالسابق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/346)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: كالسابق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/346)
text: جِئْتُ إِلَى أَبِي إِبْرَاهِيمَ ( عليه السلام ) بِمَالٍ فَأَخَذَ بَعْضَهُ وَ تَرَكَ بَعْضَهُ فَقُلْتُ أَصْلَحَكَ اللَّهُ لِأَيِّ شَيْ‏ءٍ تَرَكْتَهُ عِنْدِي قَالَ إِنَّ صَاحِبَ هَذَا الْأَمْرِ يَطْلُبُهُ مِنْكَ فَلَمَّا جَاءَنَا نَعْيُهُ بَعَثَ إِلَيَّ أَبُو الْحَسَنِ ( عليه السلام ) ابْنُهُ فَسَأَلَنِي ذَلِكَ الْمَالَ فَدَفَعْتُهُ إِلَيْهِ .

en.hubeali: Ahmad Bin Mihran, from Muhammad Bin Ali, from Al Zahhak Bin Al Ash’as Bin Al Ash’ab, from Dawood Bin Zurby who said,

‘I went over to Abu Ibrahim<sup>asws</sup> with some wealth, so he<sup>asws</sup> took part of it and left part. So I said, ‘May Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Keep you<sup>asws</sup> well! For which thing (reason) did you<sup>asws</sup> leave it to be with me?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The Master of this command (Imamate), would seek it from you<sup>asws</sup>’. So when his<sup>asws</sup> Obituary came to us, Abu Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup>, his<sup>asws</sup> son<sup>asws</sup> sent a message to me, asking me for that wealth. So I handed it over to him<sup>asws</sup>’.
en.sarwar: 13. Ahmad ibn Mihran has narrated from Muhammad ibn Ali from ad-Dahhak ibn al-Ash‘ath from Dawud ibn Zurbi who has said the following. “Once I went to deliver some property to abu Ibrahim (a.s.). He accepted some of it and left the others. I asked him, “May Allah keep you well, why have you left it with me?” He said, “The in charge of this task (Leadership with Divine Authority) will demand it from you.” When we heard the news of his (abu Ibrahim’s) death, abu al-Hassan sent his son to me asking for that property and I delivered it to him.”
